fields.name: status
fields.description: Current lifecycle status of the record.

overridableConfigKeys.label: Enforce status lifecycle
overridableConfigKeys.description: Validate and apply status transitions against the configured table. Off by default.
overridableConfigKeys.synonyms: lifecycle, statuses, states, stages, workflow, status transitions, enforce, enable, apply

overridableConfigKeys.label: Initial status
overridableConfigKeys.description: The status a new record starts in.
overridableConfigKeys.synonyms: starting state, default status, first stage

overridableConfigKeys.label: Statuses
overridableConfigKeys.description: The closed set of statuses a record can hold.
overridableConfigKeys.synonyms: states, stages, phases, statuses, lifecycle, workflow steps

overridableConfigKeys.label: Status field
overridableConfigKeys.description: Which entity field this lifecycle drives. Defaults to 'status'; set it to bind any field (e.g. 'state', 'stage', 'phase').
overridableConfigKeys.synonyms: state field, stage field, status column, lifecycle field

overridableConfigKeys.label: Target entity
overridableConfigKeys.description: Entity name whose status field this lifecycle drives (e.g. 'Contract'). Defaults to the atom's own record so the standalone validates; rebind per composition.

overridableConfigKeys.label: Allowed transitions
overridableConfigKeys.description: The legal moves: each row is { from, to, event, label }. A requested move is applied only if it matches a row.
overridableConfigKeys.synonyms: edges, allowed moves, status flow, workflow transitions
